title: Flea Treatment in Franklin Square, Long Island | $350 – $650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Franklin Square, Long Island. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Prices $350 – $650. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Franklin Square residents dealing with flea infestations need fast, reliable solutions to protect their families and pets. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Franklin Square, targeting fleas at every life stage to eliminate current infestations and prevent future outbreaks. Our licensed technicians use safe, proven methods tailored to Long Island homes and businesses.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Franklin Square and the greater Long Island area with same-day and next-day service availability. Our flea treatments come with a satisfaction guarantee, and we use pet-safe, family-friendly products that deliver lasting results without compromising your household's safety.
localContext: Franklin Square's mix of single-family homes, garden apartments, and proximity to parks like Rath Park creates ideal conditions for flea populations, especially during warmer months. Our technicians understand the unique pest challenges faced by Franklin Square homeowners, from the tree-lined streets near the Elmont border to properties surrounding the Franklin Square Plaza shopping area.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Franklin Square typically costs between $350 and $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a flea problem in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Franklin Square residents. Flea infestations can multiply rapidly, so we prioritize quick response times to prevent the problem from worsening and to provide relief for your family and pets as soon as possible.

faqs.question: Are your flea treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are specifically designed to be safe for homes with children and pets. Our technicians will provide clear instructions on any brief precautionary periods, but our treatments are formulated to effectively eliminate fleas while minimizing any risk to your household.

faqs.question: Will one treatment eliminate my flea infestation completely?
faqs.answer: Most flea infestations require a follow-up treatment 2-3 weeks after the initial service to target newly hatched fleas. Our comprehensive approach treats adult fleas, larvae, and eggs, and we'll work with you to create a treatment plan that ensures complete elimination and includes prevention strategies to keep fleas from returning.
